Details:
Monitoring over 11 sample days at a full-scale plant found mean 62 percent removal with only an 18-inch cap of 18-month-old GAC over a  sand filter. [502]  GAC is the best available technology for simazine control.
Overall, GAC offers a very attractive process for controlling chloro-s-triazines and the their metabolites. While PAC is also effective for herbicide control, GAC offers advantages especially for systems where herbicides and metabolite concentrations are significant for an appreciable portion of the year in addition to the growing season. [1425]
